title: Ladybug on a Möbius Loop
description: A ladybug crawls forever along a Möbius strip — a one-sided loop, so after a full lap it finds itself walking upside-down on the 'other' face, and only comes home after two. Switch the track to a Toroid (a torus) for an ordinary two-sided ring, and watch the bug orient itself to the twisting surface as it goes. Track, crawl speed, twist/thickness, bug size, camera orbit and colours are live and mappable.
